title: Redesign Power BI Report
description: Design and build 5 portfolio-quality report pages from scratch with clear visualizations and effective data storytelling. Depends on Task 02 (DAX measures).
acceptanceCriteria: 5 report pages created with clear purpose
Page 1: Executive Overview with hero metrics and geographic distribution
Page 2: Sustainability Dashboard with EPI/WGI analysis
Page 3: Supply Chain Risk Analysis with concentration metrics
Performance acceptable (<3 seconds per visual load)
dependencies: Task 02 must be completed first (DAX measures required)
Task 01 should be completed (DQ dashboard content)
Semantic model with all measures implemented
Power BI Desktop or Fabric workspace access
notes: Existing report will be discarded - complete redesign
This is a showcase piece - invest time in polish
Export to PDF for offline portfolio viewing
designPrinciples: Visual Hierarchy: Most important metrics at top-left
Actionability: Every visual should support a decision

subtasks.title: Design Phase: Sketch layouts and plan navigation
subtasks.details: Sketch page layouts, identify required measures, select visual types, plan drill-throughs, create color palette

subtasks.title: Build Page 1: Executive Overview
subtasks.details: Hero metrics, spend by commodity, trend chart, geographic map, top 5 suppliers table

subtasks.title: Build Page 2: Sustainability Dashboard
subtasks.details: Spend by EPI band, EPI score map, indicator analysis, WGI governance, sustainability risk matrix

subtasks.title: Build Page 3: Supply Chain Risk Analysis
subtasks.details: Supply concentration chart, critical materials table, procurement vs global supply, risk heat map

subtasks.title: Build Page 4: Material Deep Dive (drill-through)
subtasks.details: Material details, supplier breakdown, global supply concentration, EPI scores, time series

subtasks.title: Build Page 5: Data Quality Dashboard
subtasks.details: Quality scorecard, confidence distribution, unmapped values, quality flags

subtasks.title: Polish & Performance Testing
subtasks.details: Add navigation, apply formatting, test interactions, optimize performance, take screenshots
